# Pull Request

⚠️ **NOTICE: This repository does not accept external pull requests.**

This template is for internal development only. If you are an external contributor, please note that PRs from forks or external accounts will be closed without review.

For bug reports or suggestions, please open an issue instead.

---

## Description (Internal Use Only)

<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of your changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactor
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
